# Application Hub

> Application Hub is a digital platform providing a verified application catalog, technical specifications, industry news, and developer information.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.rummydex.com/): Primary application directory and search.
- [New Additions](https://www.rummydex.com/new-additions): Recently indexed applications.
- [News](https://www.rummydex.com/news): Industry news and platform updates.
- [Blogs](https://www.rummydex.com/blogs): Technical articles and guides.
- [Developers](https://www.rummydex.com/developers): Developer portal and submission guidelines.
- [About Us](https://www.rummydex.com/about): Information about Application Hub platform.
